data.title: Hibbett and PUMA donate $20,000 to Children’s of Alabama for sixth year in a row, showcasing commitment to community impact.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, athletic fashion retailer Hibbett, Inc. and global sports brand PUMA demonstrated their dedication to community support by making their sixth consecutive annual donation to Children’s of Alabama, a leading pediatric medical facility in the country. The donation, totaling $20,000, was presented to hospital leaders and Social Services staff on December 17th by representatives from both companies. This contribution underscores the ongoing commitment of Hibbett and PUMA to make a positive impact during the holiday season.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims of investors in Stride from Oct 22, 2024 to Oct 28, 2025 for potential losses. Contact them for options.
data.description: An opportunity is being extended by James Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, for investors who have faced losses in Stride. Investors who bought or obtained securities in Stride during the period from October 22, 2024, to October 28, 2025, are urged to directly reach out to him to explore their potential options for recourse.

data.title: Investors of Blue Owl Capital are urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses. Timeline: Feb 6, 2025 - Nov 16, 2025. Contact partner James Wilson directly.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Blue Owl to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Blue Owl within the period of February 6, 2025, and November 16, 2025, and wish to discuss further steps, Wilson is available for assistance.

data.title: Global electronic equipment repair services market predicted to reach $137 billion by 2032 as consumer demand drives industry shift towards technology-driven repair solutions.
data.description: A recent report titled "Global Forecast 2025-2032 for the Electronic Equipment Repair Service Market" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This market is becoming increasingly important as organizations worldwide are speeding up their digital transformation processes and adjusting to changing operational needs. The electronic equipment repair service market is vital in aiding business resilience and adherence to regulations. Senior executives are adjusting their approaches to incorporate technology-driven repair solutions to tackle growing complexity and emerging challenges.

data.title: Home Genius Exteriors appoints Suraj Akotia to strengthen governance and risk management in national expansion.
data.description: Hyattsville, Maryland - December 23, 2025 - Home Genius Exteriors is ramping up its national growth with an enhanced leadership position to bolster governance and risk management. In line with this, Suraj Akotia, who currently serves as the General Counsel of the company, has taken on a more prominent role. This move comes at a pivotal time as the company pushes forward with its expansion efforts across the nation.

data.title: $15M gift from Neil Mellen's estate boosts cancer care at Hartford HealthCare St. Vincent's Medical Center in CT.
data.description: In Bridgeport, Connecticut, the Estate of Neil Mellen has made a significant contribution towards the development of a state-of-the-art facility for advanced cancer care. The philanthropic commitment, totaling $15 million, has been directed to Hartford HealthCare's St. Vincent's Medical Center. This generous donation marks a milestone in the pursuit of enhancing healthcare services for cancer patients in the region.

data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for investors of Tvardi Therapeutics. Losses in Tvardi stock or options? Contact Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson.
data.description: If you have experienced substantial financial losses in Tvardi stock or options, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors to reach out to him directly to explore their options. To discuss your legal rights regarding losses in Tvardi, please contact him promptly.

data.title: Rafael Systems Global Sustainment chosen for MDA's SHIELD IDIQ contract, part of second staggered awards. Updates on PRNewswire.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, a company based in Reston, Virginia called Rafael Systems Global Sustainment (RSGS) revealed that it has been chosen as a recipient in the second phase of awards from the Missile Defense Agency (MDA). This selection is part of the Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) Multiple program. The specific numbers and details of the award were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Santa Claus & comedic legends to perform at Laugh Factory Hollywood for 45th annual free Christmas Feast & Comedy Show.
data.description: In Hollywood, California, the renowned Laugh Factory will mark its 45th anniversary with a special event on Christmas Day. Santa Claus and a lineup of popular comedians will entertain attendees at the club's annual free Christmas Feast and Comedy Show, including performances from familiar faces in the comedy world. The event is set to take place at the Laugh Factory Hollywood, celebrating the milestone and spreading holiday cheer.

data.title: Integrity's "Integrity Gives Back" Toy Drive donates 40,000 toys to Pediatric Hospitals, totaling 120,000 toys in 5 years.
data.description: In Dallas, on December 23, 2025, Integrity, LLC, along with its employees, partners, and community members, organized a Toy Drive that resulted in an impressive collection of 40,000 toys. This initiative has contributed to a significant milestone as the total number of toys donated since 2021 has exceeded 120,000. This generous act aims to benefit children across the country. Integrity, LLC is a prominent distributor in the industry and continues to engage in impactful community-driven efforts.
